name: Nai Keun Nao Sang Dao Yung Oun
original_name: ในคืนหนาว แสงดาวยังอุ่น
overview: Lew or Lawita a famous model became scandalous when news broke out that she was heartbroken from her boyfriend and tried to commit suicide. She survived that attempt but ended up having amnesia of the man she loved, like a part of her life was missing. This causes her to go and try to regain those memories back. She decides to go to Chiang Khan, a small town in northern Thailand where her and Traipob met and worked together. It was a quiet place where Lew was able to escape reporters bombarding her about her suicide attempt. That quietness turned into loneliness for her. She gets nightmares during the night and she feels deep down inside, danger is after her.

trailers.title: ในคืนหนาว แสงดาวยังอุ่น [Official Teaser]
